summary: High‑energy mid‑80s performance with Jerry in red and Phil on fire; recording sounds decent though source is unclear
review: The reviewer raves about the monster sets, noting Jerry’s vibrant presence and Phil’s fiery playing, capturing the strength of the band in the mid‑80s. No specific comments on the audio source are given, but the listening experience appears solid.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic 5‑star review praising performance; recording quality not addressed, so rating leans on show strength

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound clarity or mix; reviewer mentions using headphones but provides no technical details.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer describes the set as a solid monster performance typical of mid‑80s runs, with high energy throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned wearing red and delivering a strong performance.
